violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice disposed and unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
(Wooden stirrers) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Wood observed cracked and shredded. PIC informed to discontinue use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (blenders) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings and gnawed seasoning packets. Food was voluntarily disposed of by the PIC. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
